title: Branch cleanup, contributor onboarding, and rules/docs sync for open source
description: Before public release: explain git branching to the maintainer, clean up stale merged branches (dev, backup/raw-gpu-attempt, and any merged feature branches), and make the repo contributor-ready. Includes a sweep of agent memory that should be promoted into committed rules/docs so external contributors (and their AI tools) have the same context that currently lives only in private agent memory.
